title: How Long Until Dawn

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: How long must I wrestle with silence?
These echoes of emptiness ring
My heart bears the weight of your absence
While shadows keep lengthening

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But I'll trust in your unfailing love
Though the night seems endless above
Dawn will break, I know you're near
Even when you feel so far
I'll keep singing to the stars
'Til morning light appears

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Are you testing the depths of my patience?
Or teaching me ways I should grow?
My strength fades like mist in the morning
While your presence feels so low

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But I'll trust in your unfailing love
Though the night seems endless above
Dawn will break, I know you're near
Even when you feel so far
I'll keep singing to the stars
'Til morning light appears

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Deep in my soul burns a memory
Of mercies that never run dry
Though tears may still blur my vision
Your love is my constant reply
Your faithfulness spans generations
Your love is the dawn's gentle light
In the midst of my doubt and my questions
I choose to trust in your might

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But I'll trust in your unfailing love
Though the night seems endless above
Dawn will break, I know you're near
Even when you feel so far
I'll keep singing to the stars
'Til morning light appears

sections.label: Outro
lines: 'Til morning light appears
I know you're near

epigraph: having sorrow in my heart daily? how long shall mine enemy be exalted over me?
